title: Jetking is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Jetking is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
